notes: Standard compact EV e.g. BYD Dolphin. DC = 10→80%.
Mid-size sedan e.g. BYD Seal / Tesla Model 3.
SUV e.g. BYD Atto 3 / Tesla Model Y.
7-seat MPV e.g. BYD M6. Larger battery but slower DC due to thermal limits.
Premium MPV e.g. Denza D9 / Zeekr 009. Large 103kWh pack.
Commuter e-bike e.g. VinFast Evo / Gogoro Jego. AC only — no DC port.
Premium e-scooter e.g. NIU NQi / Gogoro S2. AC only — no DC port.
